name: Raze 3
author: Poki
description: Raze 3 is an action-packed shooter set in a post-apocalyptic world where humanity has taken to the skies after an alien invasion devastated Earth. Your mission is to train soldiers to battle against aliens, robots, and zombies threatening the last remnants of civilization. Choose from a wide array of weapons and equipment as you engage in fast-paced battles across multiple game modes. Customize your character’s appearance and abilities, take on daily challenges for extra rewards, and upgrade your skills and gear to turn the tide of war. Do you have what it takes to lead the fight for Earth’s survival in Raze 3? How to play Raze 3? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move! Use the scroll wheel to switch weapons! Use the mouse to aim and shoot! Who created Raze 3? Raze 3 was created by Sky9 Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Raze 3 for free? You can play Raze 3 for free on Poki. Can I play Raze 3 on mobile devices and desktop? Raze 3 can be played on your computer.
